p256Dh.description:
An [Elliptic curve Diffie–Hellman](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elliptic_curve_Diffie%E2%80%93Hellman) public key on the P-256 curve (that is, the NIST secp256r1 elliptic curve).
The resulting key is an uncompressed point in ANSI X9.62 format.

auth.description: An authentication secret, as described in [Message Encryption for Web Push](https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-ietf-webpush-encryption-08).

Keys.description: Contains the client's public key and authentication secret to be used in encrypting push message data.

userId.description: User id associated with the push subscription.

endpoint.description: The endpoint associated with the push subscription.

expirationTime.description: The subscription expiration time associated with the push subscription, if there is one, or null otherwise.

p256Dh.description:
An
[Elliptic curve Diffie–Hellman](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elliptic_curve_Diffie%E2%80%93Hellman)
public key on the P-256 curve (that is, the NIST secp256r1 elliptic curve).
The resulting key is an uncompressed point in ANSI X9.62 format.

auth.description:
An authentication secret, as described in
[Message Encryption for Web Push](https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-ietf-webpush-encryption-08).

deviceId.description: Other attributes, like device id for example.

PushSubscriptionViewModel.description: Request body model for Push registration

texte.description: Texte simple (optionnel si Media ou Card fourni)

cards.description: Cartes riches (carrousel). 10 max couramment toléré par les RBM clients.

suggestions.description: Suggestions (réponses rapides, actions) au niveau racine du message

fallbackText.description: Fallback texte pour terminaux non compatibles, si tu actives un mode repli

locale.description: Culture/UI (ex: fr-FR) si tu veux adapter libellés/suggestions

scheduleAtUtc.description: Horodatage d’envoi différé en UTC (si tu veux scheduler côté API)

webhookUrl.description: Callback notifs (DLR / interactions) si tu veux surcharger au message

url.description: URL publique ou signée (CDN) vers le média

endpoint.description: The endpoint associated with the push subscription.

expirationTime.description: The subscription expiration time associated with the push subscription, if there is one, or null otherwise.

Subscription.description: Representation of the Web Standard Push API's [PushSubscription](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/PushSubscription)
